domain: Marshall Islands stick-chart wayfinding (Pacific Micronesia): 3 chart types rebbelib (whole island chains) + meddo (smaller area) + mattang (teaching tool); 4 named ocean swells rilib (backbone NE trade winds year-round) + kaelib + bungdockerik + bundockeing; sculptural cartography of wave refraction/reflection around islands; charts memorized BEFORE voyage, never consulted at sea; wayfinder lies prone in canoe feeling pitch/roll from underlying swells.
specific_mechanism: MARSHALL-REBBELIB-MEDDO-MATTANG-3-CHART-4-SWELL-PRE-MEMORIZED-MAP-ISLAND-DISRUPTION-CASCADE-INFOFLOW: LLM information-cascade mechanism with (1) 3-tier chart hierarchy H_chart: 3 levels of pre-trained scaffolds rebbelib (global topology / whole-domain) + meddo (regional small-area) + mattang (teaching/distilled prototype); subordination structure; (2) 4-swell named-source decomposition D_swell: input signal decomposed into 4 named source-channels rilib-backbone (year-round dominant) + kaelib + bungdockerik + bundockeing; like 4 attention-source heads; (3) pre-computed wave-map at training time M_pre: refraction/reflection patterns around domain-anchors pre-computed and cached; not recomputed at inference; (4) pitch-feel sensor gate during inference g_pitch: external sensor-cue token (canoe-pitch-roll-vector analog) activates matching pre-stored swell-disruption pattern; (5) island-disruption cascade L_cascade: cascade from deep-ocean primary swell → island reflection → mixed pattern → canoe sensor → wayfinder decision; L sequential transforms with per-stage refraction-bias. Differs from R505 KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE (cistern-buffer + wind-tower + vent + sarooj), R530 KHIPU-PRIMARY-PENDANT-SUBSIDIARY-CASCADE (4-tier + 3-knot-type + decimal + correction loop), R543 YEMENI-TERRACE-GRAVITY-CASCADE (top-tier + capacity-throttle + directional valve + altitude-gradient + retention) by 3-tier chart hierarchy rebbelib/meddo/mattang + 4-swell named-source decomposition + pre-computed wave-map training-time + pitch-feel sensor inference gate + island-disruption cascade with refraction-bias per-stage.
llm_application: MARSHALL-REBBELIB-MEDDO-MATTANG-3-CHART-4-SWELL-PRE-MEMORIZED-MAP-ISLAND-DISRUPTION-CASCADE-INFOFLOW LLM mechanism + 3-tier chart hierarchy H_chart rebbelib-global meddo-regional mattang-prototype + 4-swell named-source decomposition D_swell rilib-backbone kaelib bungdockerik bundockeing + pre-computed wave-map M_pre training-time refraction-reflection cached + pitch-feel sensor gate g_pitch inference activation + island-disruption cascade L_cascade L sequential transforms refraction-bias per-stage. Differs from R488 + R500 + R505 KASHAN-QANAT (closest — cistern + wind-tower + vent + sarooj). R518. R530 KHIPU (closest — 4-tier + 3-knot + decimal + correction-loop). R543 YEMENI-TERRACE (closest — top-tier + capacity-throttle + valve + altitude-gradient + retention). Differs from Unified Routing Cascading 2410.10347 + SATER + Routing Benchmark + Edge-Cloud Routing by 3-tier chart hierarchy + 4-swell decomposition + pre-computed wave-map + pitch-feel sensor gate + island-disruption cascade. Differs by 3-TIER CHART HIERARCHY REBBELIB/MEDDO/MATTANG + 4-SWELL NAMED-SOURCE + PRE-COMPUTED WAVE-MAP + PITCH-FEEL SENSOR GATE + ISLAND-DISRUPTION CASCADE.
novelty_claim: Unified Routing Cascading 2410.10347 + SATER EMNLP 2025 + Routing Benchmark EMNLP 2025 + Edge-Cloud Routing Springer 2025 cover routing + cascading + pre-generation/post-generation paradigm. MARSHALL-REBBELIB-MEDDO-MATTANG-3-CHART-4-SWELL-PRE-MEMORIZED-MAP-ISLAND-DISRUPTION-CASCADE-INFOFLOW adds (a) 3-tier chart hierarchy + (b) 4-swell decomposition + (c) pre-computed wave-map training-time + (d) pitch-feel sensor gate + (e) island-disruption cascade with refraction-bias. Recombination — borderline lookup.
